Check Out Our Services

Nearly 65% of clients surveyed had a negative experience before finding us. it took a lot of work to rebuild that trust.​

Your Decision doesn’t have to feel like a total leap of faith

Work with a team that cares about our customers as much as our work.

(And we’re perfectionists with our work.)

Learn More

You should know that communication is kind of our thing

Our motto? Listen first, sell never

Your project is an investment. Our job is to help you weigh your options and make your best choice. Not pitch you “the thing we do.”

As fluent in "human" as in tech-speak

Integrations and 301 redirects? We translate the jargon (unless you speak the language). So you always know exactly what we’re working on. And why.

Known for lightning-fast response times

You get a dedicated project manager for the entirety of your build. And you can expect to hear back from us within hours (but often more like minutes).

Client Success Stories

Don’t just take our word for it – hear from our satisfied clients who have experienced the Trellee difference.

Leave a Review

What can we help you with?

Whether you’re a Fortune 500 or a startup in stealth mode – we give our clients the creative, technical and business talent they need to succeed.

Not sure what you need?

Build or Improve Your Online Business Presence

We help shape and enhance your business's online image, making sure you stand out on the web.

Online Lead Generation for Your Business

Our strategies boost your online presence to attract more customers and grow your business.

Enhance Your Online Visibility

We increase your visibility on social media and search engines, helping more people find your business.

Custom Coded Solutions

We offer tailored programming solutions, using popular languages like Python, JavaScript, and more, to solve your specific business challenges.

Create Your Mobile App for Android and iOS

We build user-friendly mobile apps for both Android and iOS, designed to enhance your business operations and customer interactions.

Help Me Decide

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I have to pay upfront for the services I receive?

You don’t have to pay the full price before you’re satisfied. We charge only 50% of the total payment upfront. You can pay the remaining 50% once you’re satisfied with the work.

How much does it cost to generate leads using Trellee?

We charge a flat service fee every month. Trellee will not be earning a commission on every sale you make. But we will assist you on every step till you close the sale. That’s what makes us the most affordable lead gen service in Miami.

How much does it cost to create a website in Miami?

It “used to” cost thousands of dollars before Trellee was introduced. We have brought the cost of creating a website in Miami down to only $200. It includes domain, hosting, design, content, and even SEO!

How to market my business online in Miami?

Our team of social media marketing experts and Google ads specialists will make your business visible across all kinds of online platforms so that you can get customers online.

What do you charge for digital marketing services?

We pride ourselves on offering the lowest prices for social media marketing and google ads management. Our average “cost per lead” is lower than most other digital marketing agencies in Miami.

What does it cost to create an app with Trellee?

With our help, you can create an app for your business for under $300. We offer both Android and iOS app development services in Miami.

How much do you charge for SEO?

In under $50 a month, you will be able to see your website ranking much higher in relevant organic search results. 

Do you offer blogging services?

Yes, we can create and run an online blog to promote your business. You can get fully SEO-optimized blogs posted on your website every day, every week, or every month.

content.rendered:
Welcome to Trellee.com. Your privacy is paramount to us. This Privacy Policy outlines the types of information we collect from our users, how we use it, and the steps we take to protect it. By using our website, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

Information Collection

We collect both personally identifiable information (such as names and email addresses) and non-personally identifiable information (such as browser type and IP addresses). Information is collected through various methods, including registration forms and cookies.

Use of Information

The information we collect is used to enhance your experience on our site, improve our services, and communicate with you. We may also use your information to display personalized content and possibly for marketing purposes.

Information Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or rent users’ personal identification information to others. We may share generic aggregated demographic information not linked to any personal identification information regarding visitors and users with our business partners, trusted affiliates, and advertisers for the purposes outlined above.

Data Protection

We adopt appropriate data collection, storage, and processing practices and security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of your personal information, username, password, transaction information, and data stored on our site.

User Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. If you wish to exercise these rights, please contact us at the details provided below.

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies to enhance your experience, gather general visitor information, and track visits to our website. You may choose to set your web browser to refuse cookies or to alert you when cookies are being sent.

Third-Party Services

Our site may use third-party services that collect, monitor, and analyze this type of information to increase our site’s functionality. These third-party service providers have their own privacy policies addressing how they use such information.

Children’s Privacy

Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

Changes to the Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

Contact Information

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via email at info@trellee.com.

Your Partner in Digital Excellence

At Trellee, we understand the digital landscape and how it’s constantly evolving. Our dedicated team of experts is committed to helping your business not just compete but excel in this digital era. Here’s a snapshot of our specialized services:

Build or Improve Your Online Business Presence

  • Enhance your business's online image and stand out on the web.
  • Customized strategies for online branding.
  • Focused on creating a distinctive online identity.
  • Leveraging latest web technologies for maximum impact.
Learn More

Online Lead Generation for Your Business

  • Boost your online presence to attract more customers.
  • Implementing effective lead generation strategies.
  • Targeted marketing for higher conversion rates.
  • Utilizing analytics for continuous improvement.
Learn More

ENHANCE YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA AND SEARCH ENGINE VISIBILITY

  • Increase visibility on social media and search results for better reach.
  • Tailored content and campaigns for each platform.
  • SEO and SMM strategies for enhanced exposure.
  • Continuous monitoring and adjustment for optimal performance.
Learn More

Custom Programming for Your Unique Needs

  • Providing tailored programming solutions to meet business challenges.
  • Expertise in multiple programming languages.
  • Focused on creating efficient and scalable solutions.
  • Delivering solutions that align with business goals.
Learn More

Create Your Mobile App for Android and iOS

  • Develop user-friendly mobile apps for both platforms.
  • Focusing on intuitive design and user experience.
  • Integrating the latest mobile technologies.
  • Integrating the latest mobile technologies.
Learn More

You Deserve More than Order Takers. You Deserve
  • Critical Thinkers
  • Collaborators
  • Problem Solvers
  • Trusted Advisors
  • Good Listeners
  • Strong Communicators

We've been developing award-winning websites and applications

since 2002

(That’s years before the App Store even existed)

We get it right for our clients the first time

We're a perfect match if you...
  • Value technical skills that sets you up for success not just now, but later
  • Don't want to be burned again by developers who don't deliver
  • Like frequent updates and same-day responses
But not if you...
  • Are looking for an off-the-shelf, cookie-cutter solution
  • Want a team of order takers who don't ask questions or provide advice
  • Only want to hear from us when we send you the bill

This is the <code> we live by

Be humble

No assumptions or jumping to conclusions. We always start with listening.

Be resourceful

We stay mindful of your budget. And do the most with what we have.

Be business-minded

Strategy comes first. We don't just build "pretty things." We craft business solutions.

Be motivated

Tech moves fast. We keep learning. Evolving. Adapting. And pushing forward.

Be invested

We consider ourselves an extension of your company and are as focused on results as you are.

What People Say

Hear it from those who experienced it firsthand!
